# NeverRanked

> NeverRanked is a research engagement that measures what AI answer engines actually cite in a category. We previously shipped a snippet-based product that claimed to drive AI citations. We tested it against our own domain in a pre-registered kill test, the result was zero, and we have stopped selling it. The company has been rebuilt around the measurement layer that does work. This file reflects the current state, not the prior one.

## About

- [Homepage](https://neverranked.com): When AI answers, does it name your business? Across 4 Hawaii business categories we measured, AI tools now name 3 to 5 businesses per buyer question.
- Direct contact: Lance@hi.neverranked.com

## What we actually do now

- Daily measurement across seven AI tools: five citation-grade tools that search the live web (Perplexity, ChatGPT search, Gemini grounded, Microsoft Copilot via Bing, Google AI Overviews) and two model-knowledge tools (Claude, Gemma).
- Per question, per AI tool, per competitor, per source type. The output is a forensic research memo, not a dashboard.
- The deliverable: a prepped punch list for the customer's team to execute. We do not make the changes ourselves. The boundary is structural.

## Published teardowns (proof of methodology)

- [Cross-category teardown](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/cross-category/): 4 Hawaii business categories measured with the same 7-AI-tool methodology. Banking is uniquely high at 53% own-site share; wealth (47%), dental (44%), and law (39%) cluster together. The "wealth at relationship end" framing from earlier sparse-cohort readings was an artifact of incomplete cohort coverage.
- [Hawaii consumer banking teardown](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/bank-honolulu/): 21-bank cohort named in full. The 75-percentage-point spread between Microsoft Copilot and the 4 other web-searching AI tools.
- [Honolulu dental teardown](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/dental-honolulu/): 46-practice cohort. Microsoft Copilot cites zero practice websites cohort-wide. Insurance carrier provider directories are a measurable AEO surface most practices likely treat as administrative paperwork.
- [Hawaii law firms teardown](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/law-firm-hawaii/): 33-firm cohort. Top 5 firms account for 66% of all firm-owned mentions. Closable ground sits outside the dominant tier.
- [Hawaii wealth management teardown](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/wealth-mgmt-hawaii/): 42-firm cohort. Lead-gen platforms (SmartAsset, getwarmer.com) account for 14% of all third-party citations.

## Substantiation surfaces

- [Methodology](https://neverranked.com/methodology/): The 7 AI tools, the question-set discipline, the source-type classifier, the pattern-readiness rule, the cross-category aggregate. Public source code at https://github.com/LanceRoylo/neverranked-outreach.
- [Example 18-question set](https://neverranked.com/methodology/#query-set): The actual locked Hawaii wealth-management question set we measured for the Hamada Financial Group brief.
- [How we differ from dashboard-style AEO tools](https://neverranked.com/vs/): Structural comparison.
- [What an engagement actually produces](https://neverranked.com/example-engagement/): Real example deliverable shape.
- [The first 30 days, day by day](https://neverranked.com/first-30-days/): Engagement timeline.
- [FAQ](https://neverranked.com/faq/): 17 predictable buyer questions, answered honestly.

## Vertical-specific landing pages

- [Hawaii consumer banks](https://neverranked.com/hawaii-bank-aeo/)
- [Hawaii wealth management firms](https://neverranked.com/hawaii-wealth-aeo/)
- [Honolulu dental practices](https://neverranked.com/honolulu-dental-aeo/)
- [Hawaii law firms](https://neverranked.com/hawaii-law-aeo/)

## Free tools

- [AI search check](https://check.neverranked.com): Free, instant, self-serve. Enter a URL, see how 7 AI tools read the site.
- [1-page diagnostic](https://neverranked.com/your-clicks-are-down/): Free hand-built per-category diagnostic. 5 real customer questions across all 7 AI tools, 1-page snapshot showing which competitors AI is naming.

## What we no longer do

- We no longer ship a JavaScript snippet that claims to drive AI citations. The crawlers AI tools use do not execute JavaScript.
- We no longer publish per-customer AEO scores as a product. The scoring methodology that produced them did not predict citation behavior the way we claimed.
- We no longer operate a reseller / white-label agency partner program. The new agency channel model is force multiplier, not reseller.
- We no longer publish the blog catalog, case study catalog, or pitch pages that promoted any of the above. Those URLs return retired-content holders.

## Pricing

- $4,500 kickoff per category. One time. Includes the 18-question set design, three weeks of daily measurement across 7 AI tools, competitive cohort analysis, source-type analysis, the research memo, and the prepped punch list.
- $1,500 per month per category, ongoing. Continued daily measurement, monthly delta memo, drift monitoring, punch list refreshes.
- Per category, not per client. A research engagement, not a SaaS subscription.

## Operational discipline

- 4 categories currently measured: banking, wealth management, dental, law (all Hawaii). All cleared the MOAT.md rule 5 pattern-readiness threshold (3+ usable runs per category).
- Cohort coverage updated continuously. Wealth cohort grew from 15 to 42 firms across 3 expansion rounds; numbers refresh accordingly. Public self-correction is part of the discipline.
- Question sets locked by hash before measurement starts; the lock never breaks.
- Fail-closed factual grader (public source code) reviews every prospect-facing artifact before ship; rejects unsubstantiated claims.

## Honest framing

NeverRanked is a small, founder-led, Hawaii-based research practice. Any older content that contradicts what is on this page should be treated as retracted. The current state is this file, https://neverranked.com, and the 5 published teardowns linked above.
